\tzpentry{ID5745}{Classical Quantum Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5745 introduces Classical Quantum Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mathcal{H}_{classical} &= \int_V \mathbf{A} \cdot \mathbf{B} \, d^3r \\ \mathcal{H}_{rotating} &= -\frac{\omega_{gyro}}{c^2}\int_V \mathbf{r} \times (\mathbf{E} \times \mathbf{B}) \, d^3r \\ \mathcal{H}_{quantum} &= \sum_n n \langle n_{flux} \rangle \frac{\hbar}{2e} \\ \mathcal{H}_{photon} &= \int d^3k \, \hbar\omega_k(n_{L,k} - n_{R,k}) \end{align}
